---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for USB from Mac
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What problem would this feature solve? What are you trying to do that you can't today?

## Proposed solution

A clear and concise description of what you'd like to happen.

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative solutions or workarounds you've thought about.

## Safety considerations

Does this touch disk enumeration, the privileged helper, or the format/erase path? If so, describe how it preserves the internal-disk whitelist and the S-2…S-5 safeguards.

## Additional context

Anything else that helps explain the request.
